title: Waters Extends Capabilities of Flagship TA Instruments Rheometer for Efficient and Repeatable Powder Analysis
text: MILFORD, Mass.--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $WAT #lithiumionbatteries--Waters Corporation (NYSE:WAT) today introduced new, innovative powder rheology tooling and software for its TA Instruments™ HR Rheometers allowing scientists to make preciseii, repeatable powder rheology measurements simpler and faster. Such measurements enable materials scientists to optimize the processing and end-use performance of powders used in batteries, pharmaceuticals, additive manufacturing, food, personal care products, and coatings. “Powder materials

title: Waters Announces Bay State's First LEED-Certified Chemical Manufacturing Facility
text: MILFORD, Mass.--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #LEED--Waters Corp. announces its new $215M Precision Chemical Manufacturing Facility is the first of its kind in Massachusetts to achieve LEED certification

title: Waters Corporation Presentation at the Bank of America 2022 Global Health Care Conference
text: MILFORD, Mass.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Waters Corporation (NYSE:WAT) Udit Batra Ph.D., President and Chief Executive Officer, will participate at the Bank of America 2022 Global Healthcare Conference in London, with a fireside chat on Wednesday, September 14th, 2022 at 9:05AM BST (UTC+1) / 4:05AM ET. Interested investors can access the live webcast of the event on Waters' investor relations website at https://ir.waters.com. A replay of the webcast will be available for 30 days. title: 3 Stocks Navigating the Rough Waters of Auto Equipment Industry
text: While the auto equipment industry outlook is muted amid multiple headwinds, a few industry participants like BWA, CHPT and EVGO are worth betting on owing to their solid growth endeavors.
